creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Do you like ramen? 🍜😋

This is the first event I have attended after a very very long time! Of course, it has to be a RAMEN MASTERCLASS. You know how much I love ramen, so when @takoichibanhouse invited me over, I immediately said YES! 🥰

Tako Ichiban is from the same company that founded the well-loved ramen place Ichiryu. Located in @flayvadubai @alghuraircentre, they offer affordable varieties yet high quality Japanese food. 

🍜 Ramen + takoyaki meal at 55 AED 
🍛 Rice meal at 30 AED
🧀 10 yen Cheese Coin: 17 AED

The masterclass was headed by Chef Touru who came from Japan. He dedicated a lot of time creating the perfect halal ramen recipe for the region. It was such a great opportunity to learn from the expert  and to bond with fellow ramen lovers! 

Thanks for having us over, Tako Ichiban and Flayva! 💗
